meta.name: Cluster hierarchy & markers
meta.description: Build a hierarchical dendrogram relating the Leiden clusters (uns['dendrogram_leiden']), then rank and filter marker genes per cluster (Wilcoxon). Needs an obs['leiden'] column (present on visium_hne, or run a preprocessing recipe first).
meta.provenance: scanpy clustering / marker-gene tutorial (sc.tl.dendrogram + sc.tl.rank_genes_groups + sc.tl.filter_rank_genes_groups).

readme: Orders the clusters into a dendrogram by expression similarity, then ranks marker genes per cluster with the chosen test and keeps the significant ones. Requires the `groupby` obs column — `leiden` is present on visium_hne, or run a preprocessing recipe first. Extends 'Marker genes per cluster' with the between-cluster hierarchy.

params.name: groupby
params.tooltip: obs column of cluster labels for the dendrogram and marker ranking

params.name: method
params.tooltip: differential-expression test used to rank genes
